name: salesforce-plugin
description: Plugin wrapper for Salesforce coding skills, synced from the sf-skills upstream repository.

interface.shortDescription: Plugin wrapper around the upstream Salesforce skills library.
interface.longDescription: A dedicated plugin repo for Salesforce-focused coding agents. It syncs reusable sf-* skills from the upstream salesforce-skills repository and adds plugin-specific structure for future hooks, commands, agents, manifests, and routing.
defaultPrompt: Review this Apex class with Salesforce Plugin.
Help me choose the right Salesforce skill.
Sync the latest upstream Salesforce skills.
